message:
fix: reconcile polecat display state with tmux liveness in gt rig status (gt-1qyne)

gt rig status showed polecats with stale state from beads without
checking tmux session liveness. Apply the same reconciliation logic
that gt polecat list uses (4e290ce9): tmux is ground truth.

- rig status: if session alive + state done → show working
- rig status: if session dead + state working → show done
- polecat list: add reverse direction (session dead + working → done)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
